The World's Most Iconic
Entertainment Destination

—

Atlantis The Royal

An iconic ultra-luxury resort where the impossible becomes possible. Discover a world of extraordinary experiences across stays, dining, entertainment, attractions and wellness on the shores of the Arabian Gulf.

Atlantis The Royal

Step inside to experience Dubai's newest icon. Discover the place where the impossible becomes possible. Daring and innovative, this is the most ultra-luxury experiential resort in the world.

Explore →

Atlantis, The Palm

This Dubai icon is the ultimate holiday destination for both couples and families to make lifetime memories. From thrill-seekers to foodies, sun lovers to explorers — an unforgettable experience for everyone.

Explore →

Aquaventure World

Conquer the region's largest waterpark and experience record-breaking slides and attractions. Explore Dubai's favourite aquarium, cruise along the Arabian sea and meet charming dolphins at Atlas Village.

Explore →

A Legendary Experience Awaits at
